<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-AU">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<!-- ============================================================
     SEO  (per-tenant tokens: title / description / canonical)
     ============================================================ -->
<title>Blocked Drains & Emergency Plumber Canberra | {{businessName}}</title>
<meta name="description" content="Blocked drain or burst pipe in Canberra? {{businessName}} — licensed, same-day, upfront fixed pricing. 24/7 emergency plumber across the ACT. Call now for fast help.">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://{{domain}}/">
<meta name="robots" content="index,follow">

<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="{{businessName}} — Emergency Plumber & Blocked Drains, Canberra">
<meta property="og:description" content="Same-day blocked drains, burst pipes and hot water repairs across the ACT. Licensed, insured, upfront pricing. Call now.">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://{{domain}}/">
<meta property="og:locale" content="en_AU">

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- Structured data — Plumber (drives the local pack) + FAQ -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context":"https://schema.org",
  "@type":"Plumber",
  "name":"{{businessName}}",
  "image":"https://{{domain}}/og.jpg",
  "url":"https://{{domain}}/",
  "telephone":"{{phone}}",
  "priceRange":"$$",
  "areaServed":"Canberra & the ACT",
  "openingHoursSpecification":{"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":["Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday"],"opens":"00:00","closes":"23:59"},
  "address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Canberra","addressRegion":"ACT","addressCountry":"AU"},
  "geo":{"@type":"GeoCoordinates","latitude":-35.2809,"longitude":149.1300},
  "aggregateRating":{"@type":"AggregateRating","ratingValue":"4.9","reviewCount":"212"}
}
</script>
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage",
  "mainEntity":[
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Do you offer same-day service?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. For blocked drains, burst pipes and no-hot-water jobs we aim to be on site the same day, and we run a 24/7 line for genuine emergencies."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Will I know the price before you start?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Always. We quote a fixed price up front before any work begins, so there are no surprises when the job is done."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Are you licensed and insured?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes — fully licensed ACT plumbers and fully insured. Your licence and insurance details are on every invoice."}}
  ]
}
</script>

<style>
/* ============================================================
   DESIGN TOKENS — "charcoal & hi-vis" trade theme
   ============================================================ */
:root{
  --steel-950:#141a24;   /* darkest */
  --steel-900:#1a2230;   /* hero / header bg */
  --steel-800:#243142;   /* cards on dark */
  --pipe:#1f7bb8;        /* water / steel blue */
  --pipe-deep:#155d8c;--pipe-glow:#3a8fce;
  --hivis:#ff6a1f;       /* urgent CTA orange */
  --hivis-600:#e85c14;
  --safety:#ffc400;      /* sparing yellow accent */
  --light:#eef2f6;       /* page bg */
  --ink:#1a2230;
  --muted:#5b6878;
  --line:#dde4ec;
  --white:#fff;
  --radius:12px;
  --maxw:1140px;
  --shadow:0 10px 34px rgba(20,26,36,.14);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{margin:0;background:var(--light);color:var(--ink);
  font-family:"Barlow",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:17px;line-height:1.55;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
h1,h2,h3,.display{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;line-height:.98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.01em;margin:0}
p{margin:0}
a{color:inherit}
.wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:0 22px}
.eyebrow{font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pipe)}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.5em;border:0;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em;
  font-size:19px;border-radius:10px;padding:15px 26px;text-decoration:none;transition:.15s}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.btn-call{background:var(--hivis);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,106,31,.35)}
.btn-call:hover{background:var(--hivis-600)}
.btn-quote{background:var(--white);color:var(--ink);border:2px solid var(--line)}
.btn-quote:hover{border-color:var(--pipe)}
.btn-pipe{background:var(--pipe);color:#fff}
.btn-pipe:hover{background:var(--pipe-deep)}

/* emergency strip */
.emerg{background:var(--hivis);color:#fff;text-align:center;font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:700;
  font-size:14.5px;padding:9px 16px;letter-spacing:.01em}
.emerg a{text-decoration:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6)}

/* header */
header.site{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:60;background:var(--steel-900);color:#fff}
.bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:70px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;text-decoration:none;color:#fff}
.brand .mark{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--pipe);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:22px;color:#fff}
.brand .nm{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:24px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:.9}
.brand .nm small{display:block;font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:600;font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--safety);text-transform:uppercase}
.head-call{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.head-phone{text-align:right;line-height:1.05}
.head-phone small{display:block;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9fb0c2;font-weight:600}
.head-phone b{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:23px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none}
@media(max-width:680px){.head-phone{display:none}}

/* hero */
.hero{background:
  linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(20,26,36,.0),rgba(20,26,36,.55)),
  radial-gradient(120% 120% at 80% 0%, var(--pipe-glow) 0%, var(--steel-900) 55%, var(--steel-950) 100%);
  color:#fff;padding:64px 0 70px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:5px;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,var(--safety) 0 22px,#1a2230 22px 44px);opacity:.85}
.hero .eyebrow{color:var(--safety)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(44px,7vw,84px);margin-top:12px;max-width:16ch}
.hero h1 .hl{color:var(--hivis)}
.hero-sub{margin-top:20px;font-size:20px;color:#cdd8e3;max-width:48ch;font-weight:500}
.hero-cta{margin-top:30px;display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.badges{margin-top:34px;display:flex;gap:10px 26px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.badge{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:14.5px;color:#dde6ee}
.badge .b-ic{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(31,123,184,.22);color:var(--safety);
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:15px;flex:none}
/* response device */
.resp{position:absolute;top:60px;right:max(22px,calc((100vw - var(--maxw))/2 + 22px));
  background:var(--steel-800);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 22px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.resp .pulse{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:#39d98a;margin:0 auto 10px;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,.6);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,.55)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(57,217,138,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,0)}}
.resp .big{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:40px;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.resp .lbl{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9fb0c2;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px}
@media(max-width:1040px){.resp{display:none}}

/* sections */
.section{padding:66px 0}
.section-head{max-width:62ch}
.section-head h2{font-size:clamp(32px,4.4vw,52px);margin-top:10px}
.section-head p{margin-top:13px;color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;font-weight:500}

/* services */
.svcs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.svc{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;
  transition:.15s;position:relative}
.svc:hover{border-color:var(--pipe);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.svc .ic{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--pipe),var(--pipe-deep));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 8px 18px -8px var(--pipe);text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:15px}
.svc h3{font-size:24px}
.svc p{margin-top:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:15.5px;font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.svcs{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media(max-width:560px){.svcs{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* why band */
.why{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-950),var(--steel-900));color:#fff;border-top:4px solid var(--pipe)}
.why .wrap{padding:62px 22px}
.why h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,46px)}
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:38px}
.why-item .n{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:46px;color:var(--hivis);line-height:1}
.why-item h3{font-size:21px;margin-top:8px}
.why-item p{margin-top:7px;color:#bcc8d4;font-size:15px;font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:28px}}

/* area */
.area-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:44px;align-items:center}
.suburbs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:9px;margin-top:22px}
.suburbs span{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;padding:7px 15px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:600;color:#3a4756}
@media(max-width:760px){.area-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px}}

/* reviews */
.reviews{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.review{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px}
.review .stars{color:var(--safety);letter-spacing:2px;font-size:16px}
.review p{margin-top:12px;font-size:15.5px;font-weight:500;color:#33414f}
.review .who{margin-top:14px;font-weight:700;font-size:14.5px}
.review .who span{color:var(--muted);font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.reviews{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* quote form */
.quote{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-900),var(--steel-950));color:#fff}
.quote .wrap{padding:64px 22px}
.quote-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.02fr;gap:48px;align-items:start}
.quote h2{font-size:clamp(32px,4.4vw,52px)}
.quote .lead-sub{margin-top:16px;color:#cdd8e3;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;max-width:42ch}
.q-points{margin-top:26px;display:grid;gap:13px;padding:0}
.q-points li{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;font-weight:600;color:#e4ebf2}
.q-points .t{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--hivis);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none;font-size:13px;color:#fff}
.qcard{background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;padding:28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);color:var(--ink)}
.qcard h3{font-size:26px;color:var(--ink)}
.ff{margin-bottom:13px}.ff label{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;color:#46535f}
.ff input,.ff select,.ff textarea{width:100%;padding:13px 14px;border:2px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;font-family:"Barlow";font-size:16px;color:var(--ink)}
.ff textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:74px}
.ff input:focus,.ff select:focus,.ff textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--pipe);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(31,123,184,.16)}
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:13px}
.qcard .btn{width:100%;margin-top:6px}
.q-fine{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:12px}
.q-success{display:none;text-align:center;padding:26px 6px}
.q-success.show{display:block}
.q-success .big{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:30px;color:var(--pipe)}
@media(max-width:820px){.quote-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}.form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* faq */
.faq{max-width:760px;margin:36px auto 0}
.faq details{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:11px}
.faq summary{cursor:pointer;font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:center}
.faq summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
.faq summary::after{content:"+";color:var(--hivis);font-family:"Barlow";font-size:26px;line-height:1}
.faq details[open] summary::after{content:"–"}
.faq p{margin-top:11px;color:#46535f;font-weight:500;font-size:16px}

/* footer */
footer.site{background:var(--steel-950);color:#9fb0c2;padding:52px 0 110px;font-size:14.5px}
.foot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:32px}
footer .brand{margin-bottom:14px}
footer h4{color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:17px;letter-spacing:.04em;margin:0 0 12px}
footer a{display:block;text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:8px;color:#9fb0c2}
footer a:hover{color:#fff}
.foot-legal{margin-top:34px;padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);font-size:12.5px;color:#6b7986;line-height:1.7}
@media(max-width:760px){.foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px}}

/* sticky mobile call bar */
.mobile-call{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:70;display:none;
  background:var(--hivis);box-shadow:0 -6px 20px rgba(20,26,36,.25)}
.mobile-call a{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;padding:15px;letter-spacing:.02em}
@media(max-width:680px){.mobile-call{display:block}}

:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--safety);outline-offset:2px;border-radius:5px}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*{scroll-behavior:auto!important;transition:none!important;animation:none!important}}

/* Quote First layout (id: quote-first) — reorder sections inside <main> only; classic unaffected */
html.layout-quote-first main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:2;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:3;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:4;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:5;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:6;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:7;}

/* Photo Proof layout (id: photo-proof) — reorder + reveal beforeAfter; classic & quote-first unaffected */
section[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{display:none}
html.layout-photo-proof section[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{display:block}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:2}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{order:3}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:4}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:5}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:6}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:7}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:8}
/* Before & After cards */
.ba-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:24px;margin-top:30px}
.ba-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07)}
.ba-pair{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.ba-shot{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden}
.ba-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ba-ph{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:15px;text-align:center;padding:10px}
.ba-shot[data-tag]::after{content:attr(data-tag);position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(20,30,45,.82);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:999px}
.ba-cap{padding:16px 18px 18px}
.ba-cap h3{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:22px;line-height:1;margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.ba-cap p{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:0}

/* Emergency Response layout (id: emergency-response) — reorder + reveal responseCards; other layouts unaffected */
section[data-sec="responseCards"]{display:none}
html.layout-emergency-response section[data-sec="responseCards"]{display:block}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="responseCards"]{order:2}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:3}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:4}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:5}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:6}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:7}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:8}
/* Response cards */
.rcards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(230px,1fr));gap:18px;margin-top:30px}
.rcard{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-left:4px solid var(--hivis,#ff6a1f);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
.rc-ic{flex:0 0 auto;width:46px;height:46px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--hivis,#ff6a1f),var(--hivis-600,#e25a18));color:#fff;font-size:22px;font-weight:800}
.rc-tx h3{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:20px;line-height:1;margin:0 0 4px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.rc-tx p{color:#55606e;font-size:14px;margin:0}

/* Authority Builder layout (id: authority-builder) — reorder + reveal projectStats; other layouts unaffected */
section[data-sec="projectStats"]{display:none}
html.layout-authority-builder section[data-sec="projectStats"]{display:block}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="projectStats"]{order:2}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:3}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:4}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:5}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:6}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:7}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:8}
/* Project stats band */
section[data-sec="projectStats"]{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-950,#10161f),var(--steel-900,#1a2230));color:#fff}
section[data-sec="projectStats"] .eyebrow{color:var(--safety,#ffc400)}
section[data-sec="projectStats"] h2{color:#fff}
section[data-sec="projectStats"] .section-head p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.72)}
.pstats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:8px;margin-top:30px}
.pstat{text-align:center;padding:18px 14px;position:relative}
.pstat+.pstat{box-shadow:inset 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.pstat .pv{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;line-height:.95;font-size:54px;letter-spacing:.01em;color:#fff}
.pstat .pl{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;font-size:12.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);margin-top:8px}
@media(max-width:560px){.pstat .pv{font-size:42px}.pstat+.pstat{box-shadow:none}}

/* Service Area Dominator layout (id: service-area-dominator) — reorder + reveal serviceAreas; other layouts unaffected */
section[data-sec="serviceAreas"]{display:none}
html.layout-service-area-dominator section[data-sec="serviceAreas"]{display:block}
html.layout-service-area-dominator main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-service-area-dominator main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-service-area-dominator main#top>[data-sec="serviceAreas"]{order:2}
html.layout-service-area-dominator main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:3}

.ac-stat{text-align:center;padding:14px}
.ac-stat+.ac-stat{box-shadow:inset 1px 0 0 var(--line,#e7e7e7)}
.ac-value{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;line-height:.9;font-size:clamp(46px,7vw,76px);color:var(--pipe,#1f7bb8)}
.ac-label{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:13px;color:#55606e;margin-top:10px}
@media(max-width:560px){.ac-stat+.ac-stat{box-shadow:none}}

/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Meet The Crew */
section[data-sec="crew"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="crew"]{display:block}
.crew-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:22px;margin-top:30px}
.crew-card{text-align:center;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 20px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
.crew-photo{width:112px;height:112px;border-radius:50%;margin:0 auto 16px;object-fit:cover;display:block;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.crew-avatar{width:112px;height:112px;border-radius:50%;margin:0 auto 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--pipe,#1f7bb8),var(--pipe-deep,#155a87));color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:46px;line-height:1}
.crew-name{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:25px;line-height:1;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.crew-role{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:7px 0 0}
</style>

<script>
/* ============================================================
   ANALYTICS HOOKS — same contract as the broker template, so
   both feed one events table in the platform.
   ============================================================ */
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
function trackEvent(name, props = {}){
  const payload = { event:name, site:SITE_CONFIG.business, ts:Date.now(), ...props };
  window.dataLayer.push(payload);
  console.log("[track]", payload);
  fetch('/api/events', {
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    body: JSON.stringify({ site:SITE_CONFIG.business, event:name, props:{ ...props, ts:Date.now() } }),
    keepalive:true             // call_click is the money metric — fire it even as the dialer opens
  }).catch(()=>{});
}

/* click-to-call: wire every tel link + log it (this is the money metric) */
(function wirePhones(){
  const tel = "tel:" + SITE_CONFIG.phone;
  ["emergCall","navPhone","headCall","heroCall","areaCall","formCall","footPhone","mobileCall"].forEach(id=>{
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
    if(el.tagName==="A") el.href = tel;
    el.addEventListener("click",()=>trackEvent("call_click",{location:id}));
  });
})();

/* quote submit stub */
async function submitLead(){
  const g = id => document.getElementById(id);
  const data = { name:g('name').value.trim(), phone:g('phone').value.trim(), job:g('job').value,
                 suburb:g('suburb').value.trim(), detail:g('detail').value.trim() };
  if(!data.name || !data.phone){ alert("Please add your name and phone so we can call you back."); return; }
  trackEvent("lead_submit",{ job:data.job, suburb:data.suburb });
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/api/leads', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({
        site: SITE_CONFIG.business,
        kind: "trade",
        name: data.name,
        email: null,
        phone: data.phone,
        details: { job:data.job, suburb:data.suburb, detail:data.detail }
      })
    });
    if(!res.ok) console.error("Lead save failed:", res.status, await res.text());
  } catch(e){ console.error("Lead save error:", e); }
  // Always thank the customer so a backend hiccup never bounces a real lead.
  document.getElementById("quoteForm").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("quoteSuccess").classList.add("show");
}

trackEvent("page_view",{ page:"trade_landing", trade:SITE_CONFIG.trade });
</script>
